sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74829" key="o)reiplanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρει-πλᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:291" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.291</biblScope> </bibl> (in form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀριπλ-</foreign>); and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεί-πλᾰνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:16:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.184</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀριπλ-,</foreign> <sense id="n74829.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρειπλ-</ref> </xr>); <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.</sense> </entryFree>
